title: About
text:
This is a development and test dashboard for the hubverse dashboard pipeline. It is not a production dashboard.
The hub data comes from dashboard-test-hub, a fork of example-complex-forecast-hub containing 3 models, 4 reference dates, and 52 locations.

title: Dashboard Test Hub
text:
View The Latest Forecasts

This is a test dashboard for the hubverse dashboard pipeline. It is paired with the dashboard-test-hub and used for development, testing, and CI validation.
